title: dendrobium × graciliosum
intro: Dendrobium × graciliosum, a hybrid orchid species, is a cross between Dendrobium cuthbertsonii and Dendrobium cruentum. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to calm the mind, improve sleep quality, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Dendrobium × graciliosum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve cognitive function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
